overview.description: JSON-driven multi-agent development framework with intelligent CLI orchestration (Gemini/Qwen/Codex/Claude), context-first architecture, and automated workflow execution. Features 4-level workflow system from instant execution to multi-role brainstorming.

architecture.style: Modular CLI-based microservices with agent orchestration

key_components.name: CLI Orchestrator
key_components.description: Main CLI entry point orchestrating multi-agent workflows with semantic CLI invocation

key_components.name: Command System
key_components.description: Workflow commands (plan, execute, lite-plan, lite-fix, brainstorm, issue, memory)

key_components.name: Agent Layer
key_components.description: Multi-agent system including cli-explore-agent, action-planning-agent, universal-executor, and 20+ specialized agents

key_components.name: Core Services
key_components.description: Business logic services for workflow execution, session management, and state persistence

key_components.name: Dashboard
key_components.description: Web-based dashboard for session overview, CodexLens search, graph explorer, and CLI manager

key_components.name: CodexLens
key_components.description: Python-based semantic code search engine with FTS5, embedding, hybrid search, and reranking

key_components.name: MCP Server
key_components.description: Model Context Protocol server for tool integration and context management

key_components.name: CCW LiteLLM
key_components.description: Unified LiteLLM interface layer shared by ccw and codex-lens for multi-model LLM access

key_components.name: Skill System
key_components.description: Reusable skill templates for code review, project analysis, issue management, and workflow automation

key_components.name: Workflow Templates
key_components.description: CLI templates, schemas, and protocol definitions for workflow execution
